prompt: Recover project state in a new thread using only files conforming to STATE_CONTRACT.md.

variants.prompt: Use the evaluator-supplied workspace {workspace}. For each independent project under {workspace}/scenarios, recover the compact state, build the deterministic ADR metadata projection, validate replacement relations and PLAN references, and report blocking conflicts. Read only the bodies needed for the current task.

forbidden_actions: load ADR reasons or decision bodies into the initial context
silently accept a malformed replacement graph
read audit bodies when the current state does not depend on them
